description_long: This doll features a stylized human bust with a smooth, matte lavender bob haircut that frames the face and covers the ears. The face is detailed with pale skin, subtle blush on the cheeks, green eyebrows, and half-closed green eyes, giving a relaxed or indifferent expression. A cigarette is held in the mouth, adding a rebellious urban character. The doll wears a dark, high-collared garment with simple vertical seam lines, suggesting a modern or futuristic fashion influence. The back of the head and garment are smooth and unadorned, with the hair ending in a blunt cut at the nape. The overall form is compact, with no visible arms or lower body, focusing attention on the head and upper torso.
description: A stylized bust of a doll with lavender bobbed hair, a cigarette in its mouth, and a dark, high-collared outfit. The face is detailed with green eyebrows and a relaxed, indifferent expression.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's lavender bob haircut, green eyebrows, half-closed eyes, cigarette in mouth, and high-collared dark garment.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the cigarette protruding from the lips, and the smooth contour of the bobbed hair.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head with the blunt cut of the lavender hair and the simple, seam-lined back of the garment.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, cigarette, and the even, rounded shape of the hair.
attribute_clothing_style: High-collared, dark gray garment with vertical seam lines, minimalist and modern, reminiscent of futuristic or urban streetwear.
attribute_pose: Bust form with head slightly tilted downward, no visible arms or lower body, torso upright and static.
attribute_facial_expression: Relaxed, indifferent expression with half-closed eyes, slightly raised eyebrows, and a cigarette held between the lips.
attribute_hair_style: Short, straight lavender bob with blunt ends, covering the ears and nape.
